top_signals: BREAKING: Israel kills Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib — 3rd senior assassination in 2 days (after Larijani + Nasirzadeh)

Iran arrests hundreds of 'traitors' — mass internal crackdown following leadership assassinations
Iran 'revenge' cluster missile attack on Israel — 2 killed in Ramat Gan

Hormuz easing continues — countries cutting individual deals with Iran, bypassing US coalition
Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine — Russia ready for Geneva, Lavrov pre-rejects concessions
Pakistan-Afghanistan war: no ceasefire path, 400+ dead in Kabul hospital, China mediation ongoing
Ukraine sends 201 drone experts to Gulf — Zelenskyy calls Tehran/Moscow 'brothers in hatred'

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: Iran easing Hormuz restrictions per maritime data — countries cutting individual deals instead of joining US coalition. This is a partial de-escalation on the economic front, though military strikes continue. Europe refuses Hormuz naval deployment. Putin-Trump call today is the key diplomatic variable for Ukraine. Zero ceasefire signals in ME active theaters.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib — 3rd assassination in 2 days
latest_news.text: Israel kills Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib overnight. President Pezeshkian confirms death, calls it 'cowardly assassination.' Pezeshkian mentions Larijani, Nasirzadeh also killed with family members. 3rd senior official killed in 2 days. Katz claims responsibility.

latest_news.headline: South Pars gas field struck — world's largest, coordinated with Trump admin
latest_news.text: Israel strikes South Pars gas field in Persian Gulf — world's largest gas facility, shared with Qatar. Axios reports strike was coordinated with and approved by Trump admin. Qatar FM calls it 'dangerous and irresponsible step.' Direct threat to global energy supply.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes central Beirut
latest_news.text: Israel launches strikes in central Beirut — geographic expansion of Lebanon operations into heart of capital city.

latest_news.headline: Iran arrests hundreds of 'traitors' — mass internal crackdown
latest_news.text: Iran announces hundreds arrested in crackdown on 'traitors' following killing of Larijani, Soleimani, and other officials. Internal security tightening as regime faces leadership decapitation.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard: Iran regime 'intact but largely degraded' — Senate hearing
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard tells Senate Intel hearing: Iran regime 'intact but largely degraded' due to attacks on leadership and military. Says if Iran's leadership survives, it would begin years-long rebuild of missile/drone programs. Kent resigned over Iran war intelligence dispute.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 15:04 UTC) — War Day 24. ESCALATING: (1) Israel kills Iran Intelligence Minister Khatib — 3rd senior assassination in 2 days; (2) South Pars gas field (world's largest) struck, Trump admin approved per Axios; Qatar calls it 'dangerous'; (3) Israel strikes CENTRAL BEIRUT — geographic expansion; (4) Iran mass arrests 'traitors' — internal crackdown; (5) Gabbard Senate hearing: regime 'intact but degraded'; (6) Iran revenge cluster missiles on Israel; (7) Hormuz easing via bilateral deals; (8) Putin-Trump call TODAY. Three-tier escalation: leadership decapitation → energy infrastructure → internal purge. Regime survival in question.
